newsSince: Harmonic Drive reported FY2025/3 results (sales +7% YoY, operating margin back positive) with March-quarter new orders at a four-year high (+15% YoY/+12% QoQ), and issued strong FY2027/3 guidance (sales +14.2%, operating income +141%). Management is explicitly pivoting from bare strain-wave gears to integrated, plug-and-play humanoid-robot actuators. Genuinely strengthens the humanoid-actuator bottleneck thesis, but the name is already well-covered and +100% YTD.

sources.label: 33% North American capacity expansion near Massachusetts
BigGo/TDnet: HDS FY forecast revision filing (Apr 24, 2026)

verdicts.rankRationale: Robotics/humanoid-stack lens: world-leading strain-wave reducer/actuator supplier, thesis intact, but no NEW catalyst since June 9 - April forecast hike and May results predate it. At $5.1B cap and +100% YTD the actuator monopoly is no longer hidden; crowding caps residual alpha. Hold at 25.
verdicts.bull: Dominant high-end reducer share; humanoid joint demand could expand TAM an order of magnitude; FY27 guide for +14% sales, op income +141%.
verdicts.neutral: Best-in-class actuator monopoly already widely recognized; growth largely in the price after +100% YTD.
verdicts.bear: +100% YTD and $5.1B cap leave little margin for error; humanoid ramp timing uncertain; the name is now consensus, not hidden.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Humanoid actuator volume orders / FY27 guidance delivery
verdicts.primaryRisk: Crowding and rich valuation; humanoid demand slippage
